news.t: Horizon Adds Three ETFs to Its Growing Lineup of Solutions Tailored to Today's Modern Financial Advisor

holdings.infoBox: DIVN is an equity ETF with a total of 131 individual holdings. The top holdings are QUALCOMM stock at 4.73%, Philip Morris International at 3.93%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 3.76%, AbbVie at 3.74%, and Merck & Co. at 3.58%.

overview.description: The Horizon Dividend Income ETF (DIVN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation and current income through investments in dividend-paying US large-cap companies. The fund focuses on call writing but may also employ a combination of option strategies. DIVN was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Horizon.

data.title: Horizon Adds Three ETFs to Its Growing Lineup of Solutions Tailored to Today's Modern Financial Advisor
data.text: CHARLOTTE, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Horizon announces launch of three new Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) on the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE).
